summary: Horizontal slide-in card from the right side at the top-right.

versions.changelog: Update Props API to use standard accentColor, cardBackgroundColor, and animationStiffness.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/card-top-right/src/CardTopRight.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `CardTopRight` and `cardTopRightDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Customize the CardTopRight Remotion component by setting the name, title, accentColor, titleColor, cardBackgroundColor, animationStiffness, and textDelay while preserving the horizontal slide-in animation from the right at the top right of the viewport.
